targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  td.timestamp as time,
  s.symbol,
  td.last_price as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
JOIN market_data.stocks s ON s.id = td.asset_id
WHERE 
  td.asset_type = 'stock' AND
  td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND
  s.id IN (
    SELECT s2.id 
    FROM market_data.stocks s2 
    ORDER BY s2.market_cap DESC
    LIMIT 30
  )
ORDER BY td.timestamp

SELECT
  td.timestamp as time,
  c.symbol,
  td.last_price as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
JOIN market_data.cryptocurrencies c ON c.id = td.asset_id
WHERE 
  td.asset_type = 'crypto' AND
  td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND
  c.id IN (
    SELECT c2.id 
    FROM market_data.cryptocurrencies c2 
    ORDER BY c2.market_cap DESC
    LIMIT 30
  )
ORDER BY td.timestamp

SELECT
  td.timestamp as time,
  fp.symbol,
  td.last_price as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
JOIN market_data.forex_pairs fp ON fp.id = td.asset_id
WHERE 
  td.asset_type = 'forex' AND
  td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND
  fp.id IN (
    SELECT fp2.id 
    FROM market_data.forex_pairs fp2 
    ORDER BY fp2.is_major DESC, fp2.id
    LIMIT 30
  )
ORDER BY td.timestamp

SELECT
  td.timestamp as time,
  cm.symbol,
  td.last_price as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
JOIN market_data.commodities cm ON cm.id = td.asset_id
WHERE 
  td.asset_type = 'commodity' AND
  td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND
  cm.id IN (
    SELECT cm2.id 
    FROM market_data.commodities cm2 
    ORDER BY cm2.id
    LIMIT 30
  )
ORDER BY td.timestamp

WITH latest_stock_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id)
    td.asset_id,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume,
    td.timestamp,
    LAG(td.last_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id ORDER BY td.timestamp) as prev_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.asset_type = 'stock' AND td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  s.symbol,
  s.company_name as name,
  ROUND(lsp.current_price::numeric, 4) as current_price,
  ROUND(lsp.volume::numeric, 0) as volume,
  ROUND(COALESCE(((lsp.current_price - lsp.prev_price) / lsp.prev_price * 100), 0)::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  s.market_cap / 1000000000 as market_cap_billions
FROM latest_stock_prices lsp
JOIN market_data.stocks s ON s.id = lsp.asset_id
ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC
LIMIT 30

WITH latest_crypto_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id)
    td.asset_id,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume,
    td.timestamp,
    LAG(td.last_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id ORDER BY td.timestamp) as prev_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.asset_type = 'crypto' AND td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  c.symbol,
  c.name,
  ROUND(lcp.current_price::numeric, 4) as current_price,
  ROUND(lcp.volume::numeric, 0) as volume,
  ROUND(COALESCE(((lcp.current_price - lcp.prev_price) / lcp.prev_price * 100), 0)::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  c.market_cap / 1000000000 as market_cap_billions
FROM latest_crypto_prices lcp
JOIN market_data.cryptocurrencies c ON c.id = lcp.asset_id
ORDER BY c.market_cap DESC
LIMIT 30

WITH latest_forex_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id)
    td.asset_id,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume,
    td.timestamp,
    LAG(td.last_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id ORDER BY td.timestamp) as prev_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.asset_type = 'forex' AND td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  fp.symbol,
  CONCAT(fp.base_currency, '/', fp.quote_currency) as pair,
  ROUND(lfp.current_price::numeric, 6) as current_rate,
  ROUND(lfp.volume::numeric, 0) as volume,
  ROUND(COALESCE(((lfp.current_price - lfp.prev_price) / lfp.prev_price * 100), 0)::numeric, 4) as change_percent,
  CASE WHEN fp.is_major THEN 'Major' ELSE 'Minor' END as pair_type
FROM latest_forex_prices lfp
JOIN market_data.forex_pairs fp ON fp.id = lfp.asset_id
ORDER BY fp.is_major DESC, fp.id
LIMIT 30

WITH latest_commodity_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id)
    td.asset_id,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume,
    td.timestamp,
    LAG(td.last_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id ORDER BY td.timestamp) as prev_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.asset_type = 'commodity' AND td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  cm.symbol,
  cm.name,
  ROUND(lcp.current_price::numeric, 4) as current_price,
  ROUND(lcp.volume::numeric, 0) as volume,
  ROUND(COALESCE(((lcp.current_price - lcp.prev_price) / lcp.prev_price * 100), 0)::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  cm.asset_class
FROM latest_commodity_prices lcp
JOIN market_data.commodities cm ON cm.id = lcp.asset_id
ORDER BY cm.id
LIMIT 30

WITH latest_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id, td.asset_type)
    td.asset_id,
    td.asset_type,
    td.last_price as current_price,
    td.volume as current_volume,
    td.timestamp
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.asset_type, td.timestamp DESC
),
previous_prices AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (td.asset_id, td.asset_type)
    td.asset_id,
    td.asset_type,
    td.last_price as previous_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.timestamp <= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours'
  ORDER BY td.asset_id, td.asset_type, td.timestamp DESC
)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN lp.asset_type = 'stock' THEN s.symbol
    WHEN lp.asset_type = 'crypto' THEN c.symbol
    WHEN lp.asset_type = 'forex' THEN fp.symbol
    WHEN lp.asset_type = 'commodity' THEN cm.symbol
  END as symbol,
  CASE 
    WHEN lp.asset_type = 'stock' THEN s.company_name
    WHEN lp.asset_type = 'crypto' THEN c.name
    WHEN lp.asset_type = 'forex' THEN CONCAT(fp.base_currency, '/', fp.quote_currency)
    WHEN lp.asset_type = 'commodity' THEN cm.name
  END as name,
  lp.asset_type,
  ROUND(lp.current_price::numeric, 4) as current_price,
  ROUND(lp.current_volume::numeric, 2) as current_volume,
  ROUND(pp.previous_price::numeric, 4) as previous_price,
  ROUND(((lp.current_price - pp.previous_price) / pp.previous_price * 100)::numeric, 2) as change_percent,
  lp.timestamp
FROM latest_prices lp
LEFT JOIN previous_prices pp ON lp.asset_id = pp.asset_id AND lp.asset_type = pp.asset_type
LEFT JOIN market_data.stocks s ON lp.asset_type = 'stock' AND s.id = lp.asset_id
LEFT JOIN market_data.cryptocurrencies c ON lp.asset_type = 'crypto' AND c.id = lp.asset_id
LEFT JOIN market_data.forex_pairs fp ON lp.asset_type = 'forex' AND fp.id = lp.asset_id
LEFT JOIN market_data.commodities cm ON lp.asset_type = 'commodity' AND cm.id = lp.asset_id
WHERE pp.previous_price IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ABS(change_percent) DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT 
  DATE_TRUNC('hour', td.timestamp) as time,
  td.asset_type as metric,
  SUM(td.volume) as value
FROM market_data.tick_data td
WHERE td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('hour', td.timestamp), td.asset_type
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Average Return Rates by Category (24 Hours)

targets.rawSql:
WITH hourly_returns AS (
  SELECT 
    td.asset_type,
    td.asset_id,
    DATE_TRUNC('hour', td.timestamp) as hour_period,
    FIRST_VALUE(td.last_price) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id, td.asset_type, DATE_TRUNC('hour', td.timestamp) ORDER BY td.timestamp) as open_price,
    LAST_VALUE(td.last_price) OVER (PARTITION BY td.asset_id, td.asset_type, DATE_TRUNC('hour', td.timestamp) ORDER BY td.timestamp ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) as close_price
  FROM market_data.tick_data td
  WHERE td.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
),
returns_calc AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    asset_type,
    hour_period,
    asset_id,
    (close_price - open_price) / open_price * 100 as hourly_return
  FROM hourly_returns
  WHERE open_price > 0
)
SELECT 
  asset_type,
  ROUND(AVG(hourly_return)::numeric, 3) as avg_return
FROM returns_calc
GROUP BY asset_type
ORDER BY asset_type

WITH etf_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    s.company_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC) as rank
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.company_name ILIKE '%ETF%' 
     OR s.symbol IN ('SPY', 'QQQ', 'IWM', 'VTI', 'SCHB', 'VOO', 'VEA', 'IEFA', 'VWO', 'EEM')
     OR s.id <= 74
  LIMIT 37
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  COALESCE(company_name, symbol || ' ETF') as name,
  ROUND((-8 - (RANDOM() * 4))::numeric, 3) as "VaR 5%",
  ROUND((-12 - (RANDOM() * 6))::numeric, 3) as "VaR 1%",
  ROUND((-10 - (RANDOM() * 5))::numeric, 3) as "CVaR 5%"
FROM etf_simulation
ORDER BY "VaR 5%" ASC

WITH etf_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    s.company_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC) as rank
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.company_name ILIKE '%ETF%' 
     OR s.symbol IN ('SPY', 'QQQ', 'IWM', 'VTI', 'SCHB', 'VOO', 'VEA', 'IEFA', 'VWO', 'EEM')
     OR s.id <= 74
  LIMIT 37
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  COALESCE(company_name, symbol || ' ETF') as name,
  ROUND((5 + (RANDOM() * 7))::numeric, 3) as "VaR 95%",
  ROUND((8 + (RANDOM() * 12))::numeric, 3) as "VaR 99%",
  ROUND((6 + (RANDOM() * 8))::numeric, 3) as "CVaR 95%"
FROM etf_simulation
ORDER BY "VaR 95%" DESC

WITH portfolio_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    generate_series(
      NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days',
      NOW(),
      INTERVAL '1 day'
    ) as trade_date
),
portfolio_values AS (
  SELECT 
    trade_date,
    1000000 * (1 + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM trade_date) / 86400) * 0.05 + (RANDOM() - 0.5) * 0.02) as portfolio_value
  FROM portfolio_simulation
),
running_max AS (
  SELECT 
    trade_date,
    portfolio_value,
    MAX(portfolio_value) OVER (ORDER BY trade_date ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) as running_maximum
  FROM portfolio_values
)
SELECT 
  trade_date as time,
  'Drawdown' as metric,
  (portfolio_value - running_maximum) / running_maximum * 100 as value
FROM running_max
ORDER BY trade_date

WITH pe_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    s.company_name,
    s.sector,
    15 + (RANDOM() * 25) as pe_ratio
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.market_cap > 100000000000
  ORDER BY s.market_cap DESC
  LIMIT 20
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  company_name as name,
  sector,
  ROUND(pe_ratio::numeric, 2) as pe_ratio
FROM pe_simulation
ORDER BY pe_ratio DESC

WITH options_simulation AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    100 + (RANDOM() * 100) as underlying_price
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.symbol IN ('AAPL', 'GOOGL', 'MSFT', 'TSLA', 'AMZN', 'META', 'NVDA', 'NFLX')
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  ROUND(underlying_price::numeric, 2) as underlying,
  ROUND((underlying_price * 1.05)::numeric, 2) as call_strike,
  ROUND((underlying_price * 0.95)::numeric, 2) as put_strike,
  ROUND((15 + RANDOM() * 25)::numeric, 1) as iv,
  ROUND((underlying_price * 0.02 + RANDOM() * 5)::numeric, 2) as call_price,
  ROUND((underlying_price * 0.02 + RANDOM() * 5)::numeric, 2) as put_price
FROM options_simulation
ORDER BY symbol

WITH market_sentiment AS (
  SELECT 
    s.symbol,
    s.company_name,
    CASE 
      WHEN RANDOM() > 0.6 THEN 'Positive'
      WHEN RANDOM() > 0.3 THEN 'Neutral'
      ELSE 'Negative'
    END as sentiment,
    ROUND((RANDOM() * 2 - 1)::numeric, 2) as sentiment_score,
    CASE 
      WHEN RANDOM() > 0.7 THEN 'Earnings Beat Expected'
      WHEN RANDOM() > 0.5 THEN 'New Product Launch'
      WHEN RANDOM() > 0.3 THEN 'Analyst Upgrade'
      ELSE 'Market Volatility'
    END as news_headline,
    NOW() - (RANDOM() * INTERVAL '24 hours') as news_time
  FROM market_data.stocks s
  WHERE s.symbol IN ('AAPL', 'GOOGL', 'MSFT', 'TSLA', 'AMZN', 'META', 'NFLX', 'NVDA')
  ORDER BY RANDOM()
  LIMIT 15
)
SELECT 
  symbol,
  sentiment,
  sentiment_score,
  news_headline,
  DATE_TRUNC('hour', news_time) as news_time
FROM market_sentiment
ORDER BY sentiment_score DESC

WITH correlation_matrix AS (
  SELECT 'AAPL' as asset1, 'AAPL' as asset2, 1.000 as correlation, 'stock' as type1, 'stock' as type2
  UNION ALL SELECT 'AAPL', 'MSFT', 0.75 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'AAPL', 'GOOGL', 0.65 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'AAPL', 'TSLA', 0.45 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'MSFT', 'AAPL', 0.75 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'MSFT', 'MSFT', 1.000, 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'MSFT', 'GOOGL', 0.80 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'MSFT', 'TSLA', 0.35 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOOGL', 'AAPL', 0.65 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOOGL', 'MSFT', 0.80 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOOGL', 'GOOGL', 1.000, 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOOGL', 'TSLA', 0.40 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'TSLA', 'AAPL', 0.45 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'TSLA', 'MSFT', 0.35 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'TSLA', 'GOOGL', 0.40 + (RANDOM() * 0.4 - 0.2), 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'TSLA', 'TSLA', 1.000, 'stock', 'stock'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'BTC', 'BTC', 1.000, 'crypto', 'crypto'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'BTC', 'ETH', 0.85 + (RANDOM() * 0.2 - 0.1), 'crypto', 'crypto'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'ETH', 'BTC', 0.85 + (RANDOM() * 0.2 - 0.1), 'crypto', 'crypto'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'ETH', 'ETH', 1.000, 'crypto', 'crypto'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'EURUSD', 'EURUSD', 1.000, 'forex', 'forex'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'EURUSD', 'GBPUSD', 0.70 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'forex', 'forex'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GBPUSD', 'EURUSD', 0.70 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'forex', 'forex'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GBPUSD', 'GBPUSD', 1.000, 'forex', 'forex'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOLD', 'GOLD', 1.000, 'commodity', 'commodity'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'GOLD', 'SILVER', 0.75 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'commodity', 'commodity'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SILVER', 'GOLD', 0.75 + (RANDOM() * 0.3 - 0.15), 'commodity', 'commodity'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SILVER', 'SILVER', 1.000, 'commodity', 'commodity'
)
SELECT 
  asset1,
  asset2,
  type1 as category1,
  type2 as category2,
  ROUND(correlation::numeric, 3) as correlation_coefficient
FROM correlation_matrix
ORDER BY asset1, asset2
